overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game resembling GTA V, showing a character walking through a rainy urban night environment. The character walks along sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks, stops to light a cigarette in the middle of the road while observing traffic, then continues to the opposite sidewalk. The scene features wet streets with reflections, neon-lit commercial buildings, and moderate vehicle traffic.

tall yellow street lamp casting warm light on the wet pavement
rain-soaked concrete sidewalk reflecting street lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow urban sidewalk next to a commercial building with blue trim. Yellow street lamps illuminate the rain-soaked concrete as the character approaches an intersection in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with yellow-striped crosswalk

silver sports car drives past from right to left through the intersection
white sports car crosses the intersection ahead from left to right

white sedan waiting at the traffic light on the opposite side

traffic signal pole with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide urban intersection with prominent yellow-striped crosswalks. Modern glass towers rise in the background while various sports cars drive through the intersection. The wet asphalt reflects the mixed lighting from street lamps and neon signs.

events.description: character stops walking and raises hands to light a cigarette
black SUV drives past from right to left followed by other vehicles
traffic light changes from red to green for cross traffic

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the middle of the crosswalk smoking a cigarette and observing passing traffic

blue car passing through the intersection

bright yellow fire hydrant at the corner of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character stops in the middle of the crosswalk to light a cigarette while standing still. Vehicles including a black SUV and blue car pass by as the traffic light changes from red to green. Rain continues to fall on the wet asphalt.

events.description: character lowers hands and resumes walking to finish crossing the intersection
walks past black SUV stopped at the corner traffic light
reaches the opposite sidewalk and turns right along the perpendicular street

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection and walking along the opposite sidewalk past various storefronts and signs

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped at the corner waiting for the light

entered.detail: red illuminated Supreme brand sign on building facade
multi-level parking garage with green accent lighting
wet concrete sidewalk on the opposite side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking, passes a stopped black SUV at the corner, and turns onto the perpendicular sidewalk. The Supreme store sign is visible on the right along with a multi-level parking structure. The character continues walking along the wet sidewalk with modern office towers visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, rain-slicked sidewalk into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection and back onto a bustling city walkway. It begins by moving along a commercial building with blue trim under the glow of yellow street lamps before the path opens up into a broad intersection marked by prominent yellow-striped crosswalks. As the camera reaches the center of the road, the movement pauses to light a cigarette while sports cars and a black SUV glide past across the reflective, wet asphalt. The scene then resumes its forward momentum, passing a stopped vehicle at the corner and turning onto a perpendicular sidewalk. Finally, the camera proceeds past a Supreme store sign and a multi-level parking structure, moving toward distant modern office towers under the persistent rain.
